title: vitis pilosonervia
intro: Vitis pilosonervia, also known as the hairy nerve grapevine or wild grapevine, is a species of grapevine native to China. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Vitis pilosonervia include the potential treatment of fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions, as well as its use as a diuretic and to treat digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Vitis pilosonervia are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are typically used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being and health.
